BYAMBO BITANSHI 
Buuku wa kufunjishishamo Kikaonde wa baFomu 1 Temu 3 
Ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya katataka yaimena pa kwingijisha byaketekelwa kubiwa 
(competencebasedcurriculum) amo bafunda mobafwainwa kufunda kuuba ne kulenga bintu 
kwingijisha maana akatataka ne buyuke. Nanchi kwingijisha competence based (CBC) kwaleta 
lupimpu ne kuwamishako mfunjilo ya bafunda. Kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyayukishatu 
bulongo makatazho eya na mambo aluno lupimpu lwa mfujilo yakatataka. Onkao mambo, 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyanengezha ne kupana byakwingijisha pa kufunjisha pa kuuba amba 
kufunda kulumbulukenga bulongo. Ino ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya mu Kikaonde ya shikamana 
pa mizhilo ya buyuke (competence based) ayo itundaika kufunda pabyo tupitamo mu moba 
abumi bwetu. Nanchi byaketekelwa kubiwa nobe kumvwañana, ndangulukilo yazhika, maana 
akupwisha makatazho, kulanguluka na kusabaula, kwilangulukilako, kuyuka kwingijisha 
makopyunta ne intaneti ne busulu byo byaingijishiwa mu buuku wa Curriculum Framework. 
Kabiji ino mitwe-kache, yaketekelwa kubiwa bulongo mukweseka kukwasha kufikizha mfunjilo 
ya buyuke nangwa amba CBC. Abino byaimena pa kuteshako muchima ne kwimika bipimo 
byawama byaketekelwa kubiwa. Onkao mambo, naketekela namba kuno kufunda kwa 
kwingijisha CBC mu Kikaonde mu Fomu 1, kusa kukwashako kuwamisha, kwatanchikiwa mu 
mabuuku a mizhilo ya kyalo aavula nobe, mu bintu bikwasha ku lufunjisho kutwajijila 
(Education for sustainable development), kwa 2023 ne kwa Zambia Education Curriculum 
Framework kwesekana na lutangijilo lwa 2016, alo lubena kwamba pa byakonsheka kufikizhiwa 
lufunjisho kubena Zambia. Kunungapotu, uno buuku ubena kumwesha kwibikishako kwa 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda mu kupeezhezhako bafunjishi mu mfujishilo, kupana lutangijilo 
kupichila mu mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwa bafunda alo lwaimena pa kuuba byaketekelwa 
bulongo. Bino nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila 
mu kupesapesa ne kwingijisha maana akusomba kabiji ne kubikilapo maana akwabo pa byobya 
byashalapo pa kimye kyo babena kufunjisha. 
Joel Kamoko (Mr)

LUSANCHILO 
.Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde walupulwa na bukwasho bwa bangikazhi baji mu kipamo 
kitala pa kufunda kabiji ne babuula kwingila mukino kipamo. Nanchi bantu umo umo ne bipamo 
biimena bevwangilemo ne kubika milanguluko pamo pa byakwingijisha buyuke (Competence 
Based Curriculum). Onkao mambo, kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyapana lusanchilo ku bonsetu 
bevwangilemo mukupana milangwe yabo ayo yakwashishe mu kunemba uno buuku wa Fomu1. 
mu Kikaonde. Mukupeezhako nasanchila bonse bamingilo ba ku Curriculum Development 
Centre, abo baingijile na ngovu mukumona amba ma syllabi anembewa ne kupwishiwa 
bulongo. 
Charles K. Ndkala, (Dr) 
Director of Curriculum Development 
Ministry of Education 
Permanent Secretary- Education Services 
Ministry of Education

NTENDEKELO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde wanengezhiwa mujishinda ja kukumya, mukukebesha 
kukwasha bafunjishi kufikizha mfunjishilo bulongo mu ino mfunjilo (Curriculum) ya katataka. 
Auno buuku wa lutangijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na buyuke bwa 2023 Competence Based 
Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembewa mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha 
kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku. Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, 
mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda. 
Kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho ajipo pa lupimpu lwa kutendeka 
kufunda kwingijisha buyuke bwa (Curriculum wa Competence Baesd). Nkebelo ya kwingijisha 
Competence Based Curriculum yaleta lupimpu mukuwamishako mfunjishilo. Kabiji uno buuku 
wamwesha patooka kwipana kwa kipimo kitala pa lufunjisho mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi 
kukonsha kufunjisha bulongo, kupichila mu lutangijilo, mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwaimena 
pa biketekelo bya buyuke (Competence Based Curriculum). Nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi 
batundaikwa kupesapesa ne kusomba pa kuuba amba bapwishe lukatazho pa kimye kyo bena 
kufunjisha. 
Onkao mambo, mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne kulangluka 
kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusana-pusana pa sukuulu. 
Bafunjishi batundaikwa kufunjisha kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda, kupesapesa, kwingijisha 
mashinda aitabizhiwa umvwe bekimona amba kyakila mukuwama. Kuno kupeezhako kwa mu 
mfunjishilo kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa bafuma mubuzhokoloke 
bwapusana-pusana. 
Nanchi kyamwekana Patoka amba uno buuku usa kukwashako bafunjishi kufunjisha mu ino 
mfunjilo ya katataka ya kwingijisha buyuke (Competence Based) mu kutundaika bafunda na 
maana akuyuka ne kwikala na byubilo byawama mu mfunjilo. 
BYAKWINGJISHA UNO BUUKU 
Mingilo yanengezhiwa mu uno buuku yafwayinwa kufunjishiwa mu temu 1 mu Fomu1. Nanchi 
uno buuku bamwabanya mu bishina bibiji kabiji mu bino bishina muji bibese byapusana-pusana 
nobe, kwamba ne kuteleka, kutanga, byambo, nchikameno ne nembelo. Mu kunungapotu, uno 
buuku kechi ke lufunjisho ine. Mufunjishi watundaikwa kunengezha lufunjisho kufuma mu uno 
buuku saka akyangye kufunjisha. Monai amba mwatolamo mingilo mu bibese byapusana-
pusana apa bino mwanemba lufunjisho lwa pajuuba-pajuuba.

Kimwesho, lufunjisho lwafwainwa kwikala na kwamba ne kuteleka, byambo, kutanga ne 
kunemba. Pa kunengezha lufunjisho, monai amba mwasalamo bintu ne mingilo yo musa 
kufunjisha bafunda mu byaketekelwa kubiwa. Nanchi kimo kimye lufunjisho lwakosha kwikala 
na byaketekelwa kubiwa kukila pakimo. Onkao mambo, obewa pamo nobe mufunjishi 
wafwainwa kumona kibese kibena kukebewa kutaiwapo kimye kyabaya. Kabiji yuka amba 
mingilo yonse yapanyiwa mu byaketekelwa kubiwa kechi yafwainwa kufunjishiwatu mu 
lufunjisho lumo ne, bino yafwainwa kufunjishiwa mu mafunjsho aavula. 
MASHINDA ASALWA KWINGIJISHA 
Kimye kyonse mufunjishi saka akyangye kufunjisha wafwainwa kumona mu syllabus wa fomu 1 
ne kumona mashinda obapana akufunjishilamo Litilicha. Kabiji Mufunjishi watundaikwa 
kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda.

KISHINA 1:  BYA BUNEME BYA KYALO 
Mutwe: Kwisamba 
Mutwe-kache: Mwinsambo 
Bijimo:  Mu kino kishina, mufunjishi usa kufunjisha pa bibese bitanu kutendekela na Kuteleka 
ne Kwamba, Kutanga, Kunemba, Mulakazhilo ne Ntuntulwilo. Kabiji bafunda basakuyuka bya 
buneme bya kyalo byalamata ku bumuntu bwetu. 
Mufunjishi ayuke amba kino kishina kyaimena pa kibese kya kuteleka ne kwamba, kabiji 
mafunjisho ajimo avwangamo ne mingilo ya kuuba bafunda saka bakyangye kutendeka kutanga 
ne kunemba.

bumuntu bwetu.

 Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kutanga mwinsambo pa bya buneme bya kyalo.

 Abike bafunda mu bipanyi pakuuba amba besambe. 
 Abuule bafunda kwisamba kulondela mwinsambo.

Mwingilo wakuuba (a) 
 
Bafunda batange uno mwinsambo 
   
Mwinsambo 
Nsongwakazhi ne nsongwalume baikele panshi na kwisambo pa bishina bimo bya kyalo 
byalamata bumuntu bwetu kabiji ne buwame bujimo. 
 
Jikebo:  
Obe Butemwa, nanchi wayuka kyalengela kino kyalo kyetu kya Zambia 
kwikala kyapusanako na byalo bikwabo nyi? 
 
Butemwe:  
Eee, nayuka. Kitanshi ke kya kuuba amba, muno mu kyalo kyetu kechi 
muji misalululo ine. Tuji na mitundu ne bisho byapusana-pusana, bino 
bonse  
                     twingijilatu pamo. 
 
Jikebo:      
Ibyo!  Akyo kyo waamba ke kimo kyalamata ku bumuntu bwetu. Buumo 
ke kintu kimo kyanema bingi mambo kwakubula buumo inge muji 
bushikwe 
                   
bwabaya bingi. Anga kikwabo ikika? 
 
Butemwa:   
Kukasuluka. Muno mu kyalo kyetu twakasuluka bingi. Tuji na 
                    
nsambu ya kusala bakwitutangijila pa bipimo bya buntangi bonse. 
 
Jikebo:         Byo waamba bishinka mbai, muno mu kyalo kyetu twakasuluka. 
kitukwasha ne kwikala bakosa mambo kafwako bya kwituchinya ne.

Butemwe:     Kya kine mbai, muno mu kyalo kyetu tuji na mizhilo yawama bingi 
itukikizha  
kabiji ne kukwasha mafumbi onse: banyike, bakitwala, bakulumpe ne 
bakote. 
Jikebo:          Ibyo mbai, angi monatu anweba bansongwakazhi byo mubena kufunda 
masukulu ano moba mwakila ne atweba bansongwalume epu! Kine 
bishina bya kyalo byalamata bumuntu bwetu byalengela kyalo kyetu 
kuwama ne kumwenamo. Nakusanchila mbai Butemwa pa mwinsambo 
                      wawama byonkabye, nkambo akupeshe mambo nafunjilako byavula. 
 
Butemwe:      Nsankyo mbai pa mwinsambo wanema byonkabye, ne amiwa  
                       nafunjilako byavula. Naketekela namba juba jikwabo tukesamba 
                       pa mutwe mukwabo wanema nobe ye twisambapo lelo. 
 
Jikebo:           Kafwako lukatazho ne mbai, tulombengatu kwi Lesa saka etulama 
                       na bumi. Sankyo mbai. 
 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bishina bya kyalo byalamata bumuntu 
bwetu bisambiwa bulongo.

Bya Buneme bya Kyalo 
Buneme bwa kyalo ke bishina bya kyalo byalamata bumuntu bwetu. Bino bishina biji nobe 
mizhilo ilengela bantu kwikala pamo kabiji ne kwingijila pamo nobe baana bankanzhi. Bino 
bishina byanema bingi mambo bikwasha ngubilo ne ndangulukilo ya bantu. Kabiji ilengela bantu 
kwingijila pamo ne kuyuka amba bangikazhi ba kyalo. 
Bimwesho bimo bya bishina bya kyalo ke bino: Kwinemeka umo na mukwabo, bukishinka ne 
kubula misalululo. Bino bishina byanema bingi mambo bileta buumo mu ma nyaunda abantu. 
Inge bantu bepa mushingi, kiji nobe kwingijila pamo kabiji ne kwikwasha. Bukishinka ne kubula 
misalululo nako kwanema bingi mambo kulengela kwiketekela kabiji ne kwiumvwa amba ne 
ngikazhi wa kyalo. 
Jishinda jimo jo twafwainwa kutundaikilamo bishina bya kyalo ke kupichila mu lufunjisho. 
Bafunjishi mu masukulu bafwainwa kufunjisha bafunda munema wa luusa lo bapewa biji nobe 
bunsaji ne ngubilo ya bintu mu kyalo ne mu bijiji byabo.  Bino byafwainwa kukwasha bafunda 
kwikala bangikazhi bafikilamo. Tubungwe ne bisemi nabyo bingila bingi mu kufunjisha bya 
buneme bya kyalo. Kupichila mukwingijila pamo, twafwainwa kwikala na bijiji byanemeka 
bishina bya kyalo. 
Bishina bya kyalo biji nobe bitendekesho byakwatankanya kyalo pamo. Bino bikwasha 
bangikazhi kuyuka byo bafwainwa kuuba ne kulama  manyaunda abo. Inge bantu bashilañena 
bishina bimo, kiji nobe bantu baji na ngayo imo kabiji kino kilengela kyalo kuwama kwikalamo. 
Bantu inge baumvwa ne kulondela mizhilo, kikwasha kwikala na bijiji bya kwantakana kabiji  
bingijila pamo. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kibaaba kyatangiwa kyapewa kyatangiwa 
bulongo 
Mwingilo wakuuba (b):

Bafunda bakumbule mepuzho apusana-pusana. 
Mepuzho 
1. Bishina bya kyalo biji nobe ka? 
a) Bantu 
b) Mizhilo 
c) Buneme 
d) Kwingila 
2. Mu kibaaba 1, buneme bwa kyalo bwalumbulula ka? 
3. Mu kibaaba 2, tongolapo bishina bya kyalo bisatu. 
4. Ñanyi buneme buji mu bishina bya kyalo? 
a) Bileta buumo muma nyaunda a bantu. 
b) Bilengela misalululo 
c) Bantu bafunjilako byavula 
d) Bo bungikazhi bwa kyalo. 
5. Mu kibaaba 4 muji kyambo kya “bangikazhi”, kino kyambo 
kyalumbulula amba ka? 
6. Nembapo bukwasho bubiji bukwashiwamo bangikazhi kupichila mu 
bishina bya kyalo. 
7. Panapo mashinda asatu aku tundaikilamo bishina bya kyalo. 
 
Mikumbu ya ketekelwa 
 
1. B 
2. Bishina bya kyalo byalamata bumuntu bwetu 
3. Bukishinka, kwinemeka, ne kubula misalululo 
4. A

Bibese bya nsombelo yena kwamba pa kulumbulula bantu. 
 
 Ntatwilo: Aino ke ntendekelo ya ndumbulwilo kabiji yafwainwa kumwesha byo ibena 
kulumbulula (bantu). Kikalatu kyepelo kimo. 
 Bishina bya ndumbulwilo: Aino ke nembelo ya kushimika bishinte bya kulumbula na 
ndumbulwilo ya tendekela mu ntatwilo, kabiji muno mo banemba byepelo byakila pa 
bibiji. 
 Kupwisha: Amuno mu kibese muji kwipipisha kwalumbululwa mu bishinte bya 
ndumbulwilo kabiji kimo kimye tupana ne milangwe yetu pa ndumbulwilo. 
Twiinembatu kyepelo kimo. 
 
 
Bitanwa mu nsombelo ya ndumbulwilo 
 
 Bafunda bafwainwa kwingijisha nembelo ya ndumbwilo biji nobe mwekelo, ñendelo, 
ngubilo. 
 Nembelo yafwainwa kwikala ya kuba amba, bantangi inge kebatange ino ndumbululo 
bafwainwa kupanganga ne bipikichala mu milangwe yabo. Kutanga nobe babena 
kumumona muntu. 
 Ñingijilo ya ñambilo yazhika biji nobe wa kumabumba a bantu (walamba bingi) ne kajo 
kapita mukyaji (kawama) 
 Bafunda bafwainwa kunemba kyakuuba ntangi pa kutanga ke engijishe tulango, biji 
nobe kumona, kumvwa ne kutompa. 
 Tusungami ne tulumbululo twingijishiwa mu ino nembelo. 
 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kubiwa: Kwisamba pa bibese bya nsombelo ya 
kulumbulula bantu byo bamweka kabiji ne bitanwamo bulongo 
Mwingilo wakuba (b) 
Bafunda banembe nsombelo ya kulumbulula muntu byoamweka. 
Kimwesho

Njina mukwetu umo uji na muchima wawama bingi. Jizhina janji Munema. Aye uji na 
suki yalepa, ivunga-vunga ifita ne meso atokatu to amwesha kifyele pa kulaba. Nsekelo 
yanji itokesha mu kibamba kabiji ingumvwisha bulongo kimye kyonse. 
 
Munema walepa ne bubiji wabukamenge wa kumabumba abantu, kabiji wenda bitende-
bintende akyo kimulengela kumweka bulongo kabiji uji nobe kya kumwenako 
bansongwakazhi bakwabo bakitwala. Watemwa kumvwala byakumvwala biji na 
misombelo yakema biji nobe kibobo ne kifufya biswañanya na mwaila mubiji wanji. 
Inge watwela mu kibamba, bantu bonse bajimo bayuka amba iye watwela mambo a 
ñendelo yanji ya Kwenda na kushiipa kabiji ne byo aseka na bantu. 
 
Munema ke muntu umo wa wama bingi kabiji wa kifyele. Aye unkwasha jonse inge na 
kajilwa nangwa nji na bulanda. kabiji uji bingi na bisela bindetela tuseko nangwa 
nazhingila. 
 
Nashukwa bingi kwikala na mukwetu uji nobe Munema. Ke muntu umo wawama bingi 
mambo unemeka kimye kyonse. Nasanta bingi pa kwikalapo na mulunda wa byonkabye 
mu bwikalo bwami, kabiji nayuka namba bulunda bwetu bwa myaka ne myaka. 
 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kunemba nsombela ya  
kulumbulula muntu byo amweka bulongo 
   
 
Lweseko: Bafunda banembe nsombelo ya kulumbulula muntu ye batemwa ku 
mpunzha yabo.

Kutuntulula ke jishinda ja kutuntulwilamo byaambiwa ne byanembewa kufuma mu

A. Ntuntulwilo ya pakyambo-pakyambo: Kutuntulula mulaka umo kutwala mu mulaka

D. Ntuntulwilo ya kulumbulula byambo. Ino ntuntulwilo yubiwa mu kulumbulula akya 
kyambo kyaingijishiwa mu mulaka, kabiji kyabula mu mulaka mukwabo. 
Kimwesho kya Ntuntulwilo 
Mu kizungu 
Voting is a way for people to have their voices heard and opinions respected when 
making decisions. It`s like choosing your favorite candidate or idea by casting a ballot. 
We use voting to elect leaders, make important decisions or decide on rules in our 
communities, schools or workplaces. Voting helps ensure everyone has equal say, and 
it`s usually done secretly to keep everyone`s choice private. By voting, people can 
express their opinions and contribute to making fair decisions that affect everyone. 
 
 
Kutwala mu Kikaonde 
Bunsaji ke jishinda jimo jo bebomvwinamo bangikazhi milanguluko yabo kabiji ino 
milanguluko ya nema bingi ku boba balenga mizhilo. Kiji nobe kusala muntu ye ubena 
kukeba pakuuba amba ekale ntangi kupichila mu kutaya kapepala ka bunsaji mu 
kabokoshi. Bunsanji bwingijishiwa pa kusala bantangi, abo betutangijila kabiji ne 
kulenga mizhilo ilondela bantu mu bijiji, mu masukulu nangwa konse kwingijila bantu. 
Bunsanji bukwashako muntu yense kumumvwa inge waamba kabiji kyubiwa mu 
bufyamfya pakuuba amba bunsanji bwa muntu yense bwafwainwa kuyukatu mwine. 
Kupichila mu bunsanji, bantu bamba milanguluko yabo ikwashako boba balenga mizhilo 
ya kulondela bonse. 
 
Mu Kikaonde 
 
Kufunjisha bantu pa buneme bwa kyalo ke kintu kimo kyawama bingi mambo kilengela 
bantu kuyuka byawama ne byatama mu bwikalo bwabo. Bya buneme bwa kyalo biji nobe 
mushingi, bukishinka ne kwingila na ngovu bilengela bungikazhi kufikilamo. Inge bino 
byafunjiwa, bangikazhi bata maana ku byo boba mu bijiji byabo kabiji ne kwikwasha

bene na bene. Kabiji kikwasha bangikazhi kutemwa ne kulama kyalo kyetu. Kupichila 
mu kuyuka ne kuba bino byonse, twafwainwa kwikala na bijiji byawama mwikala bantu 
bulongo benemeka. 
 
Kutwala mu Kizungu 
 
Educating people about national values is important because it helps us understand what 
is right and wrong. National values like respect, honest, and hard work guide us to be 
good citizens. When we learn these national values, we become responsible and kind 
towards others. It also helps us to love and care for our country. By knowing and 
practicing national values, we can build a better society where everyone lives in harmony 
and respect each other.    
Mwingilo Wakuuba 
Bafunda batuntulule kibaaba kyapanwa kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde 
nangwa mu Kikaonde kutwala mu Kizungu.

mashinda apusana-pusanana a ntuntulwilo kufuma mu milaka yapanyiwa kwaubiwa 
bulongo 
Lweseko: Bafunda batuntulule kibaaba kyo bapewa ku mufunjishi kya byepelo 
bibiji. 
Mpezho: Mu kino kishina bafunda baji kufunda pa bibese bitanu: Kuteleka ne Kwamba, 
Kutanga, Kunemba, Mulakazhilo ne Ntuntulwilo. Kabiji bafunda ne pa bya buneme bya 
kyalo. 
KISHINA 2: BISHINKA NE MILANGULUKO  
Bijimo:  
Mu kino kishina mufunjishi usa kufunjisha pa bibese bitanu kutendekela pa Kuteleka ne 
Kwamba, Kutanga, Kunemba, Mulakazhilo ne Ntuntulwilo. Kabiji bafunda basakuyuka 
lupusano luji pa bishinka ne milanguluko.

Mufunjishi ayuke amba kino kishina kyaimena pa kibese kya Kuteleka ne Kwamba, kabiji 
mafunjisho ajimo avwangamo ne mingilo yakuuba bafunda saka bakyangye kutendeka Kutanga 
ne Kunemba. 
 
Kalobo 
Juba jimo bufuku najinga na kipilasa bingi. Kechi netumwenepo tulo ine. Naubilengatu natala 
kuku kabiji naalukila kokwa. Kepo nalangulukile kubuuka ne kuya pangye papichilengako 
kamwela katalala. Byo natajile mwiulu namwene ñondo byo akemene bulongo. Jiulu jajinga ja 
kifufya kabiji namwene byaajilwe nobe makoonde a masabi. Bino bintu bitelwa amba myaala ya 
nshansha. Mu ino myaala ya nshansha mo mwikala tubangabanga twakukankalwa kubala. Kabiji 
byo natajile na kumusela namwene ne tubangabanga tubiji tukatampe, kampe to totwa to 
baambapo mu Baibolo twamwekele kimye kya kusemwa kwa mwana Lesa, Yesu Kilishitu. 
Kwamba amba “jiulu jiji na musombelo wa kifufya” kabiji ne kuuba amba “mwiulu muji myaala 
yanshansha muji tubanganga twakukankalwa kubala,”  ke bishinka bine, pa kuuba kwamba amba 
“tubangabanga tubiji twajinga ku musela, kampe to  totwa to baambapo mu Baibolo twamwekele 
kimye kya kusemwa kwa mwana Lesa, Yesu Kilishitu” ke milangulukotu. 
Byambo byanema: 
Bufuku                                      Akemene                                            Kifufya 
Kyaajilwe                                   Makoonde                                         Myaala ya nshansha 
Tubangabanga                             Musombelo                                        Kishinka 
milanguluko

Bishinka ne Milanguluko 
Bishinka ke byambo byakonsha kupeswa-peswa ne kutanyiwa kuuba amba byakine nangwa 
byabubela. Mwakonsha kuyuka inge bishinka byapanwa byakine inge paji bishiino bibena 
kumwesha amba abyo bishinka byakine. Kyakumwenako, “Mujilo wakaba kabiji usokañana.” 
Bino byambo ke bishinka mambo kine byo byo kiji inge twafwenya kwipi na mujilo twakonsha 
kupya. Kabiji kwamba amba “Ntanda izhokoloka juba” ke bishinka mambo bashayuka bafunda 
bya kashinshi batana amba bya kine. 
Bino milanguluko ke milangwe ya muntu mwine nangwa byo eumvwa mukachi byakonsha 
kubula kuyuka mukwabo kana aye mwine. Ino milanguluko yaimena pa bintu byaitabilamo 
muntu nangwa byo alanguka.

bakwabo bakonsha kwesakanya mulembwe ku bintu bikwabo kupusanako na byakonsha kwamba 
muntu umo. Nangwa amba “Amiwa mona nobe mpila ya ku maulu kyo kisela kyakilamo kuwama 
kukila makayo onse akaya bantu”. Uno naye ke mulangulukotu mambo kechi bonse bakonsha 
kuswa kino ne.

KIBESE C: KUNEMBA 
Mutwe:  
Ngipipishilo

Ndonda ya lufunjisho:

Mufunjishi obe bino: 
  Esambe na bafunda bintu byavwangiwa mu kwipipisha bibaaba mu bukyepelo 
 Abuule bafunda kunemba ngipipishilo mu bukyepelo 
 Alumbulule bino kuba amba kuji misango ibiji ya ngipipishilo: musango mutanshi wa 
kunemba ngipipishilo ya bishinte. Kabiji ne ya bubiji ke yakunemba ngipipishilo ya 
bukyepelo. Pano mu kino kibese tusakufundatu pa ngipipishilo ya bukyepelo. 
Ngipipishilo ya bukyepelo 
Ngipipishilo ya byepelo ke kwipipisha kwa kibaaba mu kipimo kya kyepelo nangwa musango wa 
byepelo kupichila mu kwamba pa bintu byaambiwa bulongo, mu jishinda japela kumvwisha mu 
ndonda bulongo. Kupusanako na nembelo ya ngipipishilo ya bishinte, ngipipishilo ya bukyepelo 
inembwa mu bipelu ne byepelo ne kukwatankanya bishinka bulongo mu jishinda jaumvwanyika. 
Bintu byavwangiwa mu kunemba ngipipishilo ya bukyepelo 
1. Bishinte byafuma mu kibaaba kyatangwa 
2. Kibewa kwingijisha tununga-nunga pa kunemba bipelu, nabiji “ne”, “bino”, “ponkapo”, 
“nangwa byonkabyo”. 
3. Kwingijisha tuchibawilo. 
4. Kubula kwingijisha ntendekelo ne mpezho mu kyepelo 
5. Kunemba ngipipishilo na manono 
6. Nembelo ya butooto ne kwingijisha bisopelo byafwainwa.

Mwingilo wakuuba 2: Bafunda basobolole bishinka bikatampe kufuma mu kibaaba 
  
Tanga kino kibaaba bulongo, apa bino ukumbule mepuzho alondelapo 
Bantu bavula baji na bintu byo banemeka bingi mu bwikalo bwabo. Bano bantu bamona amba 
bakikizha bino bintu ne kwibisunga bulongo. Byonkabyo, ne kyalo kyo twikalamo nakyo kiji na 
bintu bimo byo kyanemeka bingi.  
Bino bintu byanemeka kyalo bitelwa amba byabuneme bya kyalo. Bino bintu byavwangamo, 
luusa lwa bantu, kwesakana kwa bantu bonse, buchibamambo bwaoloka, mushingi ne 
lukwatankano lwa bantu.

Bya buneme bya kyalo ke mafunde ne byubilo biyukanyikisha kyalo, bisho, ne lukwatankano 
lwa bantu. Bya buneme bya kyalo bikebewa, mambo bilengela bintu bimo byanema kwikalako 
nabiji: 
Lukwatankano ne kuyukisha kyalo byo kiji: Bya buneme bya kyalo bilengela bantu ba mu kyalo 
kuyukanyikwa bonse pamo byo bakeba kuuba. Bilengela bantu kutemwa kyalo kyabo ne 
kwiumvwa amba baji na kyalo kyabo. Kuuba bino kwanema bingi mambo kyo kikebewa pa 
kuba amba bantu bakomenengako mu bwikalo. 
Mafunde atangijila bundama-kyalo: Bya buneme nabiji kwisajila bandamabyalo, buchibamambo 
bwaoloka, bwana bwa bene, ne kwesana kwa bantu bonse bilengela buntangi mu kyalo kwenda 
bulongo. 
Makochi aikelako kukikizha bino bya buneme bya kyalo mambo bantu bonse bakeba 
kwibavululamo bintu byanema byo bakonsha kulondela pa kuba amba bebyubenga.   
Bino byonse bitangijilwa na mafunde a kyalo. Mafunde ke bishina bitangijila bantu mu kuyuka 
byawama ne byatama. Mafunde aji nobe kichi. Kichi kikala na kishina, apa bino ne misampi ne 
mabula bimenako mizhilo. 
Bipimo bya ñingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Kusobolola bishinka bikatampe kufuma mu 
kibaaba kwaingijiwa bulongo

kwipipisha kibaaba kyo bapewa ku mufunjishi. 
 
KIBESE D: MULAKAZHILO

Mutwe: Mpimpwilo ne Nshinkamika 
Mutwe-kache: Nshinkamika  
Buyuke: Kwingijisha nshinkamika mu kunemba ne mu minsambo. 
Ntendekelo  
Mu kino kibese mufunjishi usa kumwesha bafunda bya kwingila na mpimpwilo ne nshinkamika. 
Apa bino ne ñambilo yazhika. 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho. Mufunjishi obe bino: 
 Alumbulwile bafunda mwatala kyambo kya nshinkamika ne mpimpwilo byo kingila.  
Nshinkamika ke nembelo nangwa ñambilo ya kushinkamika nangwa kubweluluka mu 
byambo byonse bya ambiwa.  
Kabiji bino byambo bibikiwa mu tupituluko. 
 Kimwesho: Kumvwa ba Kyapamelu amba, “Amiwa kyanshinka bulaka.” Byambo biji 
mu tupituluko (“”) byo byaamba ba Kyapamelu.   
 Kimye kimo byambo biji mu tupituluko byo bitendekelapo, saka tukyangye kutongola 
jizhina ja muntu wibyamba nobe bino: “Amiwa kyanshinka bulaka,” ba Kyapamelu 
baamba. 
 Byambo bya mu nshinkamika bitatula na kisopelo-kata. 
 Byambo bya mu tupituluko byakonsha kutendekelako nangwa kupelako. 
Kimwesho: 
1. Ku ntendekelo: “Mwanami wauba bingi bulongo uno mwaka,” ba Yoba baamba. 
2. Kumpelo: Kumvwa Maliya wabijika amba, “Mulupe muji ka nsende?” 
Mpimpwilo ke kwalulako ñambilo ya kwa ñambi. Mpimpwilo ayo yalulwako mambo 
mwavwanga ñambilo ya kushimuna, bino mulanguluko waambilamo ñambi nangwa yo 
anembelwamo kipelu kechi upimpulwa ne. Yavwangamo kwingijisha kimye ngubo kya

lunyuma. Ino nembelo kechi ikebewa kwingijisha nchibawilo ya tupituluko ne. Kwikala 
kwingijisha byambo nabiji ibile, shikishe, ipayile ne bikwabotu. 
Kimwesho: 
Nshinkamika: Kumvwa ba Yanjisha amba “nkepaya nyama mulungu wiya.” 
Mpimpwilo: Ba Yanjisha baambile amba bakepaya nyama mulungu walondejilepo. 
Mufunjishi obe bino: 
 Alumbulwile bafunda pa tuchibawilo twamweshiwa. 
 Ebabule bafunda bya kwingijisha tuchibawilo mu bipelu 
Tuchibawilo: 
 Kapezho [.] 
 Kapemeno [,] 
 Kabazhimukilo [!] 
 Kepuzho [?] 
 Tupituluko [“”] 
Tuno tuchibawilo twingijishiwa mu bipelu kwesakana na musango wa wabyo, nobe bino: 
1. “Mwila milanguluko yami, kufunda kwanema.” Maika wakumbula. 
2. Kumvwa mukwemba amba, “Batata bafunjishi.” 
3. “Yobe ñanyi uji momo mu nzubo?” Kilanga waipuzha. 
Bafunda: 
 Besambe pa tuchibawilo twapewa 
 Bachibaule bipelu bya nshinkamika yapewa

2. “Bano bantu bonse kechi bekala pamo ine. Pano bakuyuka byepi amba watama?” 
Mwashi waipuzha. 
3. Kipezha wafikenatu amba, “Kyo kika kye kyo mwaleta?”  
4. Lukwesa wakumbwile amba “Ne atweba mo motujila.” 
5. Kumvwa ba mwisho amba, “Lesa upa wimazhala.” 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Byambo bya nshinkamika byasobololwa bulongo. 
Mikumbu yaketekelwa: 
1. “Naumvwa!”

English 
 
The Girl who never gave up 
 
When Mapesho was born in 1940, in Kabwe, she was small and sickly. As a child, she 
got very sick with polio, a disease that made it hard for her to walk. The doctors said she 
might never walk again for years. she had to wear a leg, and couldn’t play like the other 
kids. 
But Mapesho didn’t give up. With a help of her family, she worked hard every day. Her 
mother massaged her leg, and Mapesho practiced walking until she could move without 
the brace. 
 
Kikaonde 
  
Kashimbi wabujile kubwela panyuma 
Pa kimye kyasemekelwe Mapesho mu mwaka wa 1940 mu Kabwe, wakepele bingi ne 
kwendatu na kukolwakolwa. Saka aji mwana, wakolelwe bingi na kikola kya kalepu, 
akyo kyamulengejile kukankalwa kwenda. Balukotaula baambile amba kechi ukendapo 
jikwabo jibiji ne pa myaka yavula. Wavwalangatu kulu kwa kulenga ne kukankalwa 
kukaya byakayanga bakwabo banyike. 
Bino Mapesho kechi wabwelele panyuma ine. Na bukwasho bwa ba mu kisemi kyanji, 
waingijilenga na ngovu pa juba pa juba. Bainanji bakandanga kulu kwanji kabiji 
wafunjilenga bya kwenda kufikilatu ne kimye kyo atendekele kwenda kwakubula 
kwingijisha kulu kwa kulenga.

KISHINA 3: KWAMBA KU JIBUMBA 
Bijimo: Kino kishina kibena kutala pa kwamba ku jibumba mu ano mashinda; kusapwila mu 
kipwilo, kwamba pa mbuñeno ne kupana mafunjisho ku mabumba a bantu. Mu kino kishina 
bafunda basakufunda bino bibese: Kuteleka ne Kwamba, Kutanga Nchikameno, Kutanga na Jiwi 
ja Peulu, Kunemba, Mulakazhilo ne Ntuntulwilo. Bafunda bafwainwa kukwatankanya bino 
byonse monka mu kishina kya kwamba ku jibumba. 
Kalobo: Bakwetu telekaipo bino byambo. Maalwa kashika asolola bintu byafyamika 
nangwa muntu watekanya usolola byubilo bya kuzhikwa. Juba jimo mbuzhi wapepe ne 
shikombwe baibile kibaya kya maalwa, betayako ne ku kiswa ne kibaya kyabo kya mwalwa. 
Pano mbuzhi ye wajinga kaseya. Byo batomene-tomene, balangulukile kubwela mukachi ka 
muzhi saka mwashala tumaalwa tucheche. Ponkapo, mbuzhi wabungulwile ñoma ne kuleta mu 
kije kya maalwa. Pano bashikombwe batwela mu nzubo ya nkabo yabo ne kwiba kisapi, 
banyinga ne mbunda. Pano ba mbuzhi bakankalwa kwimba ñoma. Byo byo batendekele 
kwimbatu jimbalakata. Bashikombwe byo baubile amba bapwishe kwinyinga kisapi bazhenga, 
ne mwina malwa wasolomoka ne byo bapalañene bonse banyemena mu kiswa………..

Kupuma Babakazhi 
Kupuma babakazhi o mambo, mwane, o twaendela ne kwisambapo lelo. Mwane kintu kitanshi, 
mushingi aye ku bakitumbafumu ba kino kijiji, mushingi ku bamitonyi bonse, mushingi ku ba 
Kansela bauno wadi, mushingi ku bonse bapwila, bataata ne ba maama. 
Mwane amiwa mbena kupana ano mawi jami ne Kangelesha Kantumoya. Mfuma pa muzhi wa 
Kisopeke monka muno mu kijiji kya Makuka. Mwane bataata ne ba Maama lelo tubena 
kwisamba pa butame mwatamina kupuma babakazhi. Kintu kitanshi mwane tutale pa wa 
mukazhi nanchi wamukazhi ye ñanyi? 
Wamukazhi ke nkwasho wa babalume mu masongola. Ye nsemi witusema atweba bonse. O ene 
mambo o tusongwela kwesakanya na buuku wa Lesa. 
Mwane muno mu kijiji mwasoloka byambo bya kuba’mba babalume batendeka kisonso kya 
kupuma babakazhi kupichila mu mukao, kichima; inge wa mukeba wakaana ke kumupuma. Pano 
mwane kañambe mba kupuma babakazhi kwatama mambo mu bijiji byonse, bafwa na mambo 
babena kukaswa ne kutaiwa pa tuleya. Kutaiwa pa kazhima kubena kutozha mapunzha mambo 
bantu bafwainwa kujima, bekala ku kaleya. Babakazhi bavula babena kuchina kwingila na ngovu 
mambo a kwibapuma ku babalume. 
Mwane na bino byo naambapo, kyasoloka patoka mba babakazhi basusubala na mambo a 
kupumwa. Pano nanchi kupuma babakazhi kwatama bingi. Mitotololo, kukaswa, kwipata mu

manyaunda ke kutozha mapunzha etu. Muntu yense, mwanyike, wamukazhi ne wamulume baji 
na nsambu ya kwikala mu mutende. Mwane babalume baji na kisonso kya kupuma babakazhi 
mwikileke. Pano nayuka mba mwateleka ne kumvwa nasanta mwane bansemi yami pa 
kunswisha kwamba kwi anweba nobe jibumba   ja kasuluka.  
Sankyo mwane. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kwamba majashi pa mutwe wapanyiwa 
kwaubiwa bulongo. 
Lweseko: Bafunda banengezhe kwamba jashi mu tumabumba.

Mwingilo wakuuba 1: Bafunda batange kibaaba 
Kalulu Kuvimba Meso 
Kalulu ke kanyama kajimuka bingi kabiji kaji bingi na lubilo. Mukenge naye ke nyama uji bingi 
na lubilo. Mukenge wabujile kalulu mba bakwetu nemumwena wamukazhi wa kusongola ne 
Kalulu waswile kusongola. Juba byo jafikile ja kusongola, ba Mukenge baile na kuleta 
wamukazhi pakuuba’mba ba Kalulu bamusongole. 
Mukenge byo akafikile kwaikalanga mwanamukazhi, wamutainetu bulongo. Pa kumona byo 
alamba, Mukenge ke kusongola kyonka kyambapo ba Kaonde mba “Kabwa mulume kechi 
usendela mukwabo kikupa ne.” Mwane ba Kalulu baubiletu pembelele-ee kasabatalatu ku 
jishinda kwaijile ba Mukenge. Pa kupitapo milungu ibiji, ba Kalulu bayukile mba mukwetu 
Mukenge wansongwela wa mukazhi. 
Byo papichile milungu ikwabo ibiji, ba Kalulu baimene kuya na kukinzha kwaile ba Mukenge na 
kuleta wamukazhi. Byo bafikile kokwa bataine Mukenge wabombola wamukazhi kumutwala ku 
mpuzha ikwabo. 
 Mwane bajinga pa muzhi, popo bajimbaikile ba Kalulu ne kwibabula’mba wamukazhi 
wafuminepotu tumoba tucheche, nanchi batweletu mu nzubo yanji bamupembelenga pa yewa 
muzhi ne kwibajishangatu ba Kalulu. Byo batwelele mu nzubo mwalaalanga yeo kamwale, 
batainemo mwemba wa “Alulai” ne bishishibechi ya mingalalangwe. Mwane ba Kalulu mba 
kejiije. Pano baubiletu talemo-talemo mwane balusula ne meso nakutala ku jishinda 
kobebabepele mba mo mwaijilenga wamukazhi. 
Bakalulu bajinga bingi na kinsonso kya kubepa bakwabo o ene mambo kyo bebabepejile mujije 
jishinda. Pano baubiletu talemo bufuku bonse bajijilenga bekangatu na kujila wamukazhi 
kwafuma ne kuvimba meso. Mu ano moba inge ubena kukeba kintu kibula kumweka, bantu 
bamba mba ukafumyakotu kalulu kuvimba meso. Kyatama kubepa bantu mambo juba jimo ne 
atweba baketubepa. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kipimo kwafwainwa ufunda(fomu) kutanga 
byanembwa mo kya fwainwa.

Mepuzho 
1. Inge muntu kampebelele bintu bibula kumweka, ufumyako ka?

3. Kwesakanya na kulanguluka kobe mambo ka ba Kalulu kyo bebabepejile? 
4. Lumbulula bimweka mwemba wa Alulai? 
5. Ñanyi kanyama katanyiwa mu bishimi javula? 
6. Ñambilo ya kwamba’mba ‘kabwa mulume kechi usendela mukwabo kikupa ne’ 
ilumbulula ka? 
7. Mu ino ñambilo kabwa mulume ke kimpashañano kya ka? 
8. Kikupa mu ino ñambilo kyaimenako ka? 
Mikumbu yaketekelwa 
1. Kalulu kuvimba meso 
2. Wasongwele waipangwizhenga ba Kalulu 
3. Mambo nabo babepanga bakwabo 
4. Walengwa na misombelo ibji alwe lubaji musombelo umo mu lubaji lukwabo 
musombelo ungi. 
5. Kalulu  
6. Kyalumbulula bantu babula kubila bakwabo bintu byawama na mambo a lwiso. 
7. Muntu witemwa mwine, ubula kukwasha bakwabo 
8. Kintu kyawama kuja nangwa kwingijisha.

Kimwesho: 
Bafunda bafwainwa kwipipisha jishimikila jo batanga.  
Ngipipishilo 1 
 Bamukenge baile nakuleta wamukazhi pakuuba’mba ba Kalulu basongole 
 Pa kumona byo alamba mwanamukazhi, Mukenge wasongwele.

 Ba Kalulu bayukile’mba Mukenge wasongola wamukazhi. 
 Kalulu waimena kuya na kukinzha kwaile ba Mukenge na kuleta wamukazhi. 
 Bakalulu bafikile pamuzhi paikalanga wa mukazhi. 
 Bakalulu bebapele pa kulaala mwalanga wamukazhi 
 Bakalulu mu nzubo batainemo mwemba wa “Alulai” 
 Beyekangatu na kujila wamukazhi kwafuma ne kuvimba meso. 
Kalulu Kuvimba Meso 
Kalulu kechi kasongwele ine pano Mukenge wabujile Kalulu mba ne mumwena wamukazhi 
wakusongola. Juba byo jafikile ja kusongola, ba Mukenge baile nakuleta wamukazhi walamba, 
pano kobaile bakamusongola abo bene. Byo papichile milungu ikwabo ibiji baimene kuya na 
kukinzha kwaile ba Mukenge na kuleta wamukazhi. Pa kufika kokwa, bataine Mukenge 
wabombola wamukazhi kumutwala ku mpunzha ikwabo. Byo batwelele mu nzubo mwalalaanga 
wamukazhi bataine mo mwemba wa-Alulai. Bakalulu beyekangatu na kujila wamukazhi 
kwafuma ne kuvimba meso. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kibaaba kyatangiwa kyaipipishiwa bulongo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 3: Bafunda banembulule kibaaba kyatangiwa 
Mukumbu waketekelwa: 
Bakalulu ne Mukenge baikalanga pamo bino bonse kechi basongwele ne. Mukenge 
walangulukile kukebela mukwabo wamukazhi, wa kusongola. Kimye byo kyafikile kya 
kusongola, ba Mukenge baile kwaikalanga wamukazhi ye bakebejile ba Kalulu. Byo 
bakamutaine kabiji abo bene ba musongola. Ba Kalulu baubiletu pembelelee-e, kyapelako ke 
kulondelakotu napo kutanamba ba Mukenge babombola yeo wamukazhi. 
Ba Kalulu byo bafikile pa yeo muzhi, bebapeele pa kulaala monka mwalaalanga wamukazhi 
pano batainemotu mwemba wa-Alulai. Ba Kalulu bufuku bonse ne mute baendangatu na kujila 
wamukazhi kwafuma ne kuvimba meso. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bibaaba byatangwa byanembululwa bulongo

Kutanga 
Nzolo wa baana kechi uyuzha bibovu ne kabiji ne nzolotu wafwa meso usalaila bakwabo. Ne ku 
banyama nako, kabwa wachimuka kuulu kechi wikwanya ne. Kabiji kabwa mulume kechi

Byaketekelwa kwisambapo 
Kulumbulula bimweka nyama. 
Kibaaba 1: Ndumbululo: Jizhina ja nyama, musombelo wanji ne byo-oba. 
Kibaaba 2: Wakulama nyi, anyi wamungye,  ne byubilo byanji 
Kibaaba 3: Ñanyi bukwasho bo apana mu buzhokoloke, nkomeno yanji. 
Kibaaba 4: Kwipwiluluka na banyama bakwabo 
Kibaaba 5: Bya kupezhako, kupaana milangwe pa byo ulanguluka pa uno nyama. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bintu byavwangiwa mu kunemba nsombelo ya 
kulumbulula bisambiwa bulongo.

Mwingilo wakuuba 2: Bafunda banembe nsombelo ya kulumbulula bimweka nyama. 
Nsombelo yafwainwa kwipashako na ino; 
Bimweka Bokwe 
Bokwe ke Nyama uchinwa ku bantu ne bakwabo banyama. Bokwe uji na mazhina avula bingi 
kwesakanya na byubilo byanji. Bokwe umweka kuchiluluka nobe boya bwa nkonzhi. Mazhina a 
bokwe akwabo ke ano; Ntambo, Tembwe ne ja Nkalamo. Mutwe wanji wabaya kabiji kuji ne 
kiyaaya. Bokwe wipaya banyama bakwabo ne bantu ke kajo kanji. 
Bokwe kechi ba mulela ku bantu ne, wikala mungye kimo kimye bamwita’mba mfumu wa mu 
jisaka. Bokwe watemwa kulaala mu bisakasaka kabiji usemena mu mayengo. Javula ukwata 
bakwabo banyama bufuku. Ku bantu, watemwa kukwata balala bwandangye nangwa mba 
palwañene. O ene mambo kyo bamwichila’mba kasakilwa ba mitaanda. Javula ba Bokwe bakota 
bo bakwata bantu mambo a kukankalwa kukwata banyama bakwabo. 
Bokwe uji na bukwasho mu buzholoke ne mu bwikalo bwa bantu mambo uji mu bukibujizhi. 
Bokwe umwesha bantu biji bamfumu, byo bamweka ne byubilo byabo. Kabiji manyi ne ntenzhi 
yanji bebibika pamichi yapusana-pusana. Bamfumu myaka ya kala baingijishanga manyi a 
bokwe kwipanguzhizhamo babakazhi. 
Bokwe kechi ujipo na buyukanwe na banyama bakwabo ne. Bokwe mulume watemwa ne 
kuchiba pondala wa mpunzha mo ekala kwingijisha masukula kabiji kafwako mukwabo Bokwe 
mulume wafwainwa kutwelamo ne, kanatu Bokwe mukazhi. 
Mwane uno nyama ke nyama wawama kufunjilako bantu mambo bamumvwina bingi ku 
mukazhanji. Ye nyama ko tufunjila buntangi, bulobo ne bukiyangala. Pawamina bokwe ke pano; 
inge Bokwe mukazhi, kakebe kukwata muntu, bokwe mulume ulamwina kabiji inge wakwata 
nyama, kimye kimo wakonsha kushilako kibinda mukwabo muntu. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Nsombelo ya kulumbulula bimweka nyama 
inembwa bulongo 
Lweseko: Bafunda banembe nsombelo ya kulumbulula banyama ba pa mazubo a 
bantu.

KIBESE D: MULAKAZHILO  
Mutwe 1: Nshinkamiko ne Mpipwilo  
Mutwe-kache: Mpimpwilo 
 Buyuke: Kulenga bipelu bya mpimpwilo. 
Ntendekelo: Mu kino kibese bafunda basakufunda bya kulenga bipelu bya mpimpwilo 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
Mufunjishi obe bino; 
 Akwashe bafunda kunemba mpimpwilo ya bipelu. 
 Ebabuule kwingijisha tuchibawilo mu bipelu bya mpimpwilo 
 Kulenga bipelu bya kumwesha mpimpwilo 
 Kupimpula bipelu bya mpimpwilo kutwala mu nshinkamika kabiji ne kufumya mu 
nshinkamika kutwala mu mpimpwilo  
Mpimpwilo (nshimutwilo) ke kwambulula bintu byaambile muntu kwakubula kwingijisha 
byambo bine byo aambile. Mu kifulo kya kwingijisha tupituluko, kikebewa kupimpulako kimye 
ngubo kyaingijishiwa mu nshinkamika ne tusuñami. 
Nembelo ya Mpimpwilo 
1. Kafwako kwingijisha tupituluko nabiji. 
2. Javula kwikala kwingijisha byambo bya byubilo nabiji ambile, bujile, ipwizhe. Twingijisha 
“ile” kumwesha kimye ngubo kya luno. 
Mpimpwilo 
- 
Ba kafunga baambile mba Kamanga waimbile mu jibumba ja banyimbi 
- 
Muntu wijizhañenye’mba  bwaijile 
- 
Kalombwana witotele mba wajinga na mali avula. 
Bafunda: 
 Besambe bya kunemba bipelu bya mpimpwilo

 Bengijishe tuchibawilo mu bipelu bya mpimpwilo 
 Balenge bipelu bya kumwesha mpimpwilo 
 Banembe bipelu bya mpimpwilo kutwala mu nshinkamika kabiji ne kufumya mu 
nshinkamika kutwala mu mpimpwilo 
Mwingilo wakuuba 1: Kwisamba ne kutuluka bipelu bya mpimpwilo 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bipelu bya mpimpwilo bisambiwa ne kutulukwa 
bulongo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 2: Bafunda bengijishe tuchibawilo mu bipelu bya mpimpwilo. 
Bipelu 
1. Bakafunga baambile mba Kamanga waimbanga muji bumba ja ba nyimbi. 
2. Muntu wijizhañanye amba wakelelwe. 
3. Kalombwana witotele mba wajinga na mali avula. 
4. Waambile’mba wanembelenga mwingilo ye bamupeele. 
5. Ñambi waambile mba ukajamo bulongo mu nsamushi. 
Kipimo kya ñingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Tuchibawilo mu bipelu bya mpimpwilo twaingijishiwa bulongo 
Mwingilo wakuuba 3: Bafunda balenga bipelu byamwesha mpipwilo ya mulaka. 
Mikumbu yaketekelwa 
1. Basapwishi baambile’mba Mulemena waimbanga mu jibumba ja ba ñimbi. 
2. Kalulu witolele mba wajinga bingi na myotoka yavula. 
3. Muntu wijizhañenye amba wakelelwe. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa 
Bipelu byamwesha mpipwilo ya mulaka yalengewa bulongo

Mwingilo wakuuba 4: Bafunda kutuntulula byambo bya mpipwilo kutwala mu 
nshinkamika kabiji ne kufumya mu nshinkamika kutwala mu mpimpwilo 
Mikumbu yaketekelwa 
1. (i). Bakafunga baambile’mba Kamanga waimbile mu jibumba ja banyimbi. (Mpimpwilo) 
(ii). “Kamanga wimba mu jibumba ja ba nyimbi,” byo byaambile bakafunga. 
(Nshinkamika) 
2. (i). Muntu wijizhañanye amba bwaila. (Mpimpwilo) 
(ii). “Bwaila” byo bijizhañanye muntu. (Nshinkamika) 
3. (i). Kalombwana witotele mba wajinga bingi na mali avula. (Mpimpwilo)  
(ii). “Njina mali avula” byo bitotele kalombwana. (Nshinkamika) 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kuubiwa: 
Byambo bya mpimpwilo kutwala mu nshinkamika kabiji ne kufumya mu nshinkamika kutwala 
mu mpimpwilo byapimpulwa bulongo.

Kimwesho: 
A. Tulo twajile baleele-Kino kilumbulula mba inge uji mu tulo umweka nobe wafwa kabiji 
ushala pa byavula. 
Bya kwingijisha: Bakwetu inge tuzensalale tukashala mo pa bya bukomo mambo tulo twajile 
baleele. 
B.“Kajo ntontontonto- Kino kilumbulula’mba mu njimino, kajo kechi kekalatu na muntu umo 
ne, katuntuluka wajinga na kajo kesha, lelo wikabula. 
Bya kwingijisha: Mubena kwilemena na mataba enu ne amiwa nkekala nao. Kajo ntontontonto.

Ndumbulwilo ne mwa kwingijisha ñambilo yazhika bisambiwa bulongo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 2: Bafunda babanye ñambilo yazhika mwayila mingilo yayo 
Kwabanya kwa bafunda kwipasheko na kuno:

kanatu bakupa bya kuja)

Ñambilo yazhika mwayila mingilo yayo yaabanyiwa bulongo.

Mwingilo wakuuba 3: Bafunda batuluke ñambilo yazhika yafwainwa ya kwingijisha 
mu bimye bimo. 
Ñingijilo ya bafunda ipasheko na ino: 
1. Kimye: Inge uji na mali acheche pano uji na baana bakutuma ku masukulu, obewa nsemi 
kechi wafwainwa kuvwala byawama ne. 
Ñambilo:  Nzolo wa baana kechi uyuzha kibovu ne. 
2. Kimye:  Muntu wafwaina kwingila na ngovu ne kumona bintu, pano kechi wayuka mwa 
kwibingijishisha ne. Pano kabiji kemumwenetu bakwabo mu mingilo yanji. 
Ñambilo: Nzolo wafwa meso usalaila bakwabo.  
3. Kimye: Inge muntu uji mu kikota kya bufumu kebakebe kumuswanyika, pano bamo 
kebamulengulule mba wakonyangala bino saka aji na maana. 
Ñambilo: Mwina makoko kechi wipipa munwe ne. 
4. Kimye: Bimo bimye mwanobe wafwainwa kwikimita bino obewa mwine ne kuyuka 
bukiji ne, bakwenu abo bayuka. 
Ñambilo: uji mu kilulu kya ñoma kechi umvwa byo bawelela ne. 
Kipimo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Ñambilo yazhika yafwainwa ya kwingijisha mu bimye bimo yatulukwa bulongo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 4: Bafunda bayuke ne kunemba bintu ne bimye mwa

maluba, twa kebanga kumona kusapuka kwabo ne kufika palepa mu mfunjilo. Twa lubileko 
kujashi ja kyovwe kabiji twayile ne mu kuteya kifumpa.

kujizhiba. Twa vundumukile lubilo.Byo twa kafikile kujizhiba,bantu kyajitu nobe nenge ya 
mebele, kabiji Bonse Makalala baji nabichi saka baimana mu mutunta.Na mamb o akuba 
amba,aki jingatu mabanga,kwajingatu tu mata tucheche.

wa kebelenga  kunyema.Pano bibinda byonse byaji nama tochi.Inge kebi munyike pa 
mukola,kyovwe pa kumona kyeya  kya tochi,wa tumbukilenga mwiulu ne kupuya mema na 
bukaji.

kabilo,kwaishile buta bwa ba Ngalande AK 47.Monka mu ku mu munyika,amba alupuke na

 Kutanga kibaaba     
 
Munyaunda ya Katajika muji bipwilo jikumi. Bino bipwilo byaikela mukinkala-nkulo na 
mikochi ya mabwe abuneme nobe ngolode. 
 
Na mambo aino mikochi yavulako, bakitwala bavula betumpile mu biseela byapusana-pusana 
abyo bibaletelela misongo, kuleka masukuulu ne kubula kwikala bakishinka mu mwingilo wa 
Lesa. 
 
Monka mukuvula kwa bantu, bipwilo nabyo byamanamine na mambo akukepelwa bantu mu 
moba akupwila kwabo. 
Bantangi babino bipwilo jikumi, bekonkenye na kwisambapo pa mashinda afikilamo 
akubwezhezhamo bakitwala mu bipwilo byabo. Basapwishi-kata bapwishishe amba, “Tuletepo 
kubekya kwa bakitwala muňimbilo. 
 
Bonse baitabwenzhenye ne kubikamo mali afika ku  bitota bitanu bya biumbi bya ba Kwacha. 
Kabiji babikilepo ne muzhilo wakwamba amba, “Bakekala mu kuno kubekya, kana bonkaba 
bapwila mu bipwilo jikumi bya munyaunda ya Katajika.

Jino jiwi pakufika mu matwi abakitwala, bafumineko ja katonto lubilo ne kubwela ku bipwilo 
byabo na kukosesha bunyimbi. Mulungu walondejilepo mwane, bipwilo byayujile kya mama 
nafwa. Oo! Twaluba  byakutwa, ne benyitu bavula benungileko ku mabumba abanyimbi, 
 
Juba ja kubekya byo jafikile, kwajikukiletu bantu jiku nobe bantu bonse bapwamo muntanda. 
Kya kine mulanguluko wakubekya wabwezhezhe bavula mu bipwilo. Kino kiseela kyatwajijile 
mwaka yense mutuntulu.  
 
Kukwatakana kwa bantangi, kwabwezhezhe mikoko yavula yajinga muibila. Lelo jino, bipwilo 
byasangulwa.

BUTEMWE BWA YALUFISHI NE MATEUSA 
Yalufishi ne Mateusa betemwene bingi, kabiji kechi bayukile kushalañana ine. Bonse babiji 
bajinga babuya kabiji bamwekangatu nobe baana bajivumo jimo, nanchi balunda na muntutu. 
 
Bano babiji bajinga na bimino bya nshinshiki, ne mikupa ya oloka bulongo nobe baana ba Lesa. 
Musombelo naye,haa! Batokeletu nobe maloba amushinge. 
 
Juba jimo, Yalufishi kechi wamwekele pa kukya lukeelo ine. Bainanji ba Jabota baishile na 
kumulangula amba, “Yalufishi! Walanguka byepi?” Kutala bibye, kunzanza meso, bamwene 
mashi ne kikululu kufuma mu kazubo kabichi mwalaalanga Yalufishi. Ba Jabota muchima 
munda, tee! Bapona ne kafula mukonko. 
 
Baanabalume pa muzhi balondejile kikululu kufikatu ne ko kyaile. Mwanene, kutanatu bokwe 
walaala byobya sulubya ne Yalufishi kulubaji lukwabo. Bonse babiji saka bapungila. 
Baanabalume baashile bokwe mingele, Wafwa ne kufwijijila. 
 
Bantu ke kwita, “Yalufishi!Yalufishi buuka!” Walabamotu jiso jimo wabwela wazhinzhibala. 
Mateusa byo akelejile na kupempula mulundananji, bamutambulwijile ku mabingo akatampe aku 
mubula amba, “Mateusa! Musama wobe, wafwa! Bamwipaya ku bokwe!” Mateusa naye 
winakula palaajile musama wanji, naye pazhindama.  
 
Papichile pepi ma awala abiji, bonse babiji kasa befumbachila po bapapukile mukichika kya 
lufu. Kumvwa bantu kyawelela na lusekelo amba, “Bonse babiji basanguka! Iyai mumone!” 
Kumvwa bakwabo bashikisha amba, “Anweba, kya kinenyi?” Kumvwa bakwabo amba, “Ee, kya 
kine! Ne bainabo baji kupungila balabamo.” Bantu baundukijile konka na kumona ne bashetu 
bailenga na kuchaba nkunyi ya pakijilo, babwelelemo.

kusekelelamo ne kumwesha butemwe bwa umo ne mukwabo. 
Nzubo yami yo mpunzha mo balenga bya kuvulukilako ne mpunzha mwikala butemwe. 
 
Mwingilo  wakuuba 
Bafunda banembe nsombelo ya Ndumbulwilo pa muntu ye batemwa. 
 
Kipimo kyañingijishilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa : Nsombelo  ya Ndumbulwilo ya nembewatu 
bulongo. 
 
 
KIBESE D: MULAKAZHILO 
Mutwe: Bipasho -ñumvwino

Buyuke : Kwingijisha bipasho - ñumvwino mu bipelu. 
 
Mwingilo wakuuba : Kulumbulula mwaila kyambo kya bipasho -ñumvwino . 
 
Byakuuba Mufunjishi :  
Mufunjishi alumbulule mwaila kyambo kya bipasho ñumvwino. 
Bipasho -ñumvwino ke kyambo kiji mu mutundu wa byambo bizakula milanguluko kupichila 
mu kusombolola bilulumo bya byubilo,musango nangwa bukyami. 
 
Mu milaka ya kina Afilika ,kipasho ñumvwino,kilumbulula bilulumo bibwelulukapo mu 
kusolola kyubilo, buneme, ngubilo,ne bikwabotu.

Mutwe 2: Ñambilo Yafyamika  
Mutwe kache : Ñambilo 
Buyuke : Kwingijisha  ñambilo ya fyamika 
  
Mwingilo  wakuuba 1 : Bilumbuluzhi ne kwisamba pa  ñingijishilo. 
Mufunjishi epuzhe bafunda jino jipuzho: 
Ñambilo yafyamika yo ika? 
 
Jino ke jishinda ja kwingijishishamo byambo bya mulaka bilengela ndumbulwilo, ñumvwino 
 
ne kuzhikisha mulaka 
 
Ke mulaka wafyamika, bino saka ayula bishinte byavula mukukwasha banembi ne baňambi 
 
bamulaka kulenga bikope mu milanguluko, kuzakula ňumvwino ne kutolamo lubaji. 
 
MITUNDU YA ÑAMBILO YAFYAMIKA 
1. Kintente: Ino yo ñambilo ya kubaisha kintu nangwa kyubilo kupitaila pa kipimo. 
Kimwesho: 
 Byo amwene bainainji, walakashishe muyulo wamipolo. 
Kutetemesha kwapitaila pa kipimo mambo mutwe wa muntu kechi mukola wayula mema ine. 
2. Kipasha-Muntu:  
Kushikula byubilo bya muntu ne kwibibika mu kyabula kwikala muntu, nobe bichi,mujilo, banyama, ne 
bikwabotu. 
Kimwesho 
 Lufu lubena ku mwita. 
3. Nkinji 
 Nkinji ke ňambilo nangwa ndembelo ya byambo ilumbulula kipusano/kupusana na kyaketekelwa. 
Kimwesho 
Muntu wakankalwa kusonsola nangwa kaňonyi kamubi.  Pakufika pa muzhi bamutambulwila amba, 
“Mwasonsolai mwane!” 
 
Mwingilo wakuuba 2 
Kubika ňambilo yafyamika kwesekana na mingilo yayo. 
 
Byakuuba bafunda 
Bafunda besambepo ne kubika ñambilo yafyamika ne mingilo yayo mujino jishinda:

 Kipasha-muntu 
 Kintente 
 Nkinji 
 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Ñambilo yafyamika ya bikwa monka mwaila mingilo 
yayo.  
 
Mwingilo wakuuba 3 
Kukeba mashinda akwabo mo twakonshesha  kwingijishisha ñambilo yafyamika. 
Byakuuba mufunjishi: 
Mufunjishi atundaike bafunda kuya na kupalanguzha mu bantu ne mu mabuku ñambilo yafyamika 
ya Kikaonde. 
 
  Mpalanguzho    
Byakuuba Bafunda 
Kupalanguzha mu bantu ne mabukua ñambilo yafyamika ne mingilo yayo. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Mashinda afwainwa mwakwingijishisha ñambilo 
yafyamika yatulukwatu bulongo. 
 
KIBESE E: NTUNTULWILO 
Mutwe: Ntuntulwilo 
Mutwe-kache: Mashinda akutuntulwilamo 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana akutuntulwilamo kufumya mu mulaka 
mukwabo ne kutwala mu mulaka mukwabo(kufumya mu kizungu kutwala mu kikaonde nangwa 
kufumya mu kikaonde kutwala mu kizungu). 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
 Kulumbulula ntuntulwilo 
 Mashinda akutuntulwilamo 
 Kutuntulula bibaaba byanembwa 
(a) Kulumbulula kyambo kya ntuntulwilo: kino kyambo kyalumbulula kufumya kibaaba   
kyanembwa nangwa kyambiwa kufumya mu mulaka umo kutwala mu mulaka mukwabo.

(b) Mashinda akutuntulwilamo:  
1. Ntuntulwilo ya kufumyamo byambo bimo:  Ino ntuntulwilo ke yakufumyamo byambo ne 
myanzo ya byambo mu mulaka mutanshi abya byabula kunema mukulumbulula bulongo mulaka 
mukwabo(wabubiji). 
Kimwesho: 
Kizungu: He over slept . 
Kikaonde: Walaajijile 
Pano, Kikaonde kechi kya tuntululwa pa kyambo pa kyambo ine. 
2. Ntuntulwilo ya ndumbuluzhi: Ke jishinda ja kutuntulwilamo apa pabula byambo mu mulaka 
mukwabo. Kipeela kutuntulula kupichila mu kulumbulula akya kyambo kyabula mu yeo mulaka 
pakuuba amba mulaka omvwanyike bulongo. 
Kimwesho: 
Kizungu: Surgical doctor 
Kikaonde: Dokotala 
Kyamupelela Kaonde kumvwa kyambo kya dokotala kukila kuyuka mitundu ya madokotala. 
3. Ntuntulwilo ya kunungako byambo: Kunungako kupichila mu kwingijisha myanzo ya byambo 
apa pabujijila pakuuba amba mulaka omvwanyike bulongo. 
Kimwesho:  
Kizungu: The message was touching. 
Kikaonde: Byambo byaji kwambiwa lelo, byaji ku nkwata ku muchima. 
4. Ntuntulwilo ya kupingishishamo kyambo kyaesakana na kikwabo mu mulaka mukwabo: 
Kimwesho: The coffee helped clear the fog in my brain. 
Kikaonde: Mema akyuya apwishile kime mu bongo bwami. 
Kizungu: The examination was as easy as a pie. 
Kikaonde: Lweseko  lwa peleletu nobe mema.
